description: Create animation blueprints, blend spaces, montages, state machines, Control Rig, IK rigs, ragdolls, and vehicle physics.

assetPath.description: Existing asset to modify (e.g. the montage for add_montage_section).

assets.description: setup_retargeting: source animation sequence paths to duplicate onto targetSkeleton ('retargetAssets' accepted as fallback).

assignToMesh.description: Assign the created physics asset to the skeletal mesh.

attachBoneName.description: create_socket/configure_socket: bone the socket attaches to ('boneName' accepted as fallback).

automaticRule.description: set_transition_rules: auto-trigger when the source sequence player finishes (default false).

axis.description: mirror_weights: mirror axis X/Y/Z (default X); set_axis_settings: Horizontal/Vertical (default Horizontal).

basePoseAnimation.description: set_additive_settings: base pose animation asset path.

bidirectional.description: set_transition_rules: also allow the reverse transition (default false).

blendParameters.description: create_blend_tree: blend axis configs ({name, min, max}).

blendTime.description: set_blend_in/set_blend_out: blend duration in seconds ('time' accepted as alias).

blueprintPath.description: Anim Blueprint asset path (bind_anim_notify, add_state_machine, add_state, add_transition, set_transition_rules; 'assetPath' accepted for the state-machine actions).

bodyType.description: add_physics_body: Sphere, Box, or Capsule/Sphyl (default Capsule).

boneTracks.description: create_procedural_anim: per-bone keyframe tracks ({boneName, frames:[{frame, location, rotation}]}).

center.description: add_physics_body: primitive center offset (x, y, z).

clothAssetName.description: bind_cloth_to_skeletal_mesh: cloth asset to bind (omit to list available cloth assets).

compileReferencers.description: force_rebuild_blend_space: recompile AnimBlueprints referencing this blend space (default true).

constraintName.description: add_physics_constraint: joint name for the new constraint.

createIfMissing.description: set_curve_key: create the curve if it doesn't exist yet (default true).

forceRootLock.description: set_root_motion_settings: force root lock even when not additive (default false).

functionName.description: bind_anim_notify: BlueprintCallable function to call when the notify fires.

gridY.description: create_blend_space: axis-1 grid divisions when dimensions=2 (default 3).

limits.description: add_physics_constraint/configure_constraint_limits: angular limits (swing1LimitAngle, swing2LimitAngle, twistLimitAngle, swing1Motion, swing2Motion, twistMotion); falls back to the flat swing/twist fields below when omitted.

modularRig.description: create_control_rig: create as a modular rig (default false).

montagePath.description: play_anim_montage: montage to play; add_montage_section: montage to edit ('assetPath'/'name' accepted as fallback).

newBoneName.description: rename_bone: new name for the (virtual) bone.

notifyClass.description: add_notify/add_notify_state/add_montage_notify: AnimNotify(State) class name (e.g. PlaySound; 'AnimNotify_' prefix optional).

outputPath.description: create_physics_asset: output asset path (default: <mesh>_PhysicsAsset next to the mesh).

overwrite.description: setup_retargeting: overwrite an existing retarget destination asset (default false).

parentBone.description: add_bone: parent bone name; set_bone_parent: new parent bone (empty unparents to root; 'parentBoneName'/'newParentBone' accepted as fallback).

path.description: Legacy alias of savePath (create_procedural_anim, create_pose_library, create_montage, create_blend_space_1d/2d, create_aim_offset, create_anim_blueprint, create_control_rig, create_ik_rig, create_ik_retargeter) or of skeletonPath (create_skeleton).

physicsAssetPath.description: Existing physics asset path (list_physics_bodies, add_physics_body, configure_physics_body, add_physics_constraint, configure_constraint_limits).

propertyName.description: set_anim_graph_node_value: node property to set (dot-notation for nested structs).

relativeLocation.description: create_socket/configure_socket: socket location relative to its bone (x, y, z).

relativeRotation.description: create_socket/configure_socket: socket rotation relative to its bone (pitch, yaw, roll).

relativeScale.description: create_socket/configure_socket: socket scale relative to its bone (x, y, z; default 1,1,1).

removeChildren.description: remove_bone: also remove child bones (default false).

rootBoneName.description: create_skeleton: name for the initial root bone (default 'Root').

sampleValue.description: add_blend_sample: sample coordinate — a number for 1D blend spaces or {x, y} for 2D.

save.description: Persist the created/modified asset to disk (default true; most authoring actions).

sectionIndex.description: bind_cloth_to_skeletal_mesh: mesh section index to bind.

simulatePhysics.description: configure_physics_body: enable physics simulation on this body (default true).

sourceChain.description: set_retarget_chain_mapping: source IK Rig chain name.

sourceIKRigPath.description: Source IK Rig asset path for create_ik_retargeter.

startTime.description: Section start time in seconds (alias of 'time').

suffix.description: setup_retargeting: filename suffix for duplicated assets (default '_Retargeted').

swing1LimitAngle.description: configure_constraint_limits: swing1 angle when 'limits' is omitted.

swing2LimitAngle.description: configure_constraint_limits: swing2 angle when 'limits' is omitted.

targetChain.description: set_retarget_chain_mapping: target IK Rig chain name.

targetClass.description: bind_anim_notify: class to cast the owner to (e.g. /Game/.../BP_CPP_Character or a /Script class).

targetIKRigPath.description: Target IK Rig asset path for create_ik_retargeter.

targetWeightInterpolationSpeed.description: set_interpolation_settings: blend weight interpolation speed per second (default 5).

transitions.description: create_state_machine: transitions to add ({sourceState, targetState, crossfadeDuration}).

treeName.description: create_blend_tree: name for the new blend tree node.

twistLimitAngle.description: configure_constraint_limits: twist angle when 'limits' is omitted.

vehicleName.description: Legacy alias of actorName for configure_vehicle.

wheels.description: configure_vehicle: per-wheel configs ({boneName, offset, radius, width, friction}).

name: animation_physics

description: Create/sculpt landscapes, paint foliage, and generate procedural terrain/biomes.

alignToSpline.description: scatter_meshes_along_spline: orient meshes to the spline tangent.

bClosedLoop.description: create_spline_actor: close the spline into a loop.

componentName.description: Spline actions: name of the spline/spline-mesh component.

componentsX.description: create_landscape: number of components along X (alternative to componentCount).

componentsY.description: create_landscape: number of components along Y (alternative to componentCount).

cubemapPath.description: spawn_sky_light/create_sky_light: cubemap asset path when sourceType is SpecifiedCubemap.

index.description: add_spline_point: insertion index (-1/omitted appends at the end).

lightClass.description: spawn_light/create_light/create_dynamic_light: light actor class (e.g. PointLight); alias of lightType/type.

operation.description: modify_heightmap: how to apply heightData/strength (default: set). 'add' is accepted as an alias of 'raise'.

pointIndex.description: remove_spline_point/set_spline_point_position/set_spline_point_tangents/set_spline_point_rotation/set_spline_point_scale/set_spline_type: index of the point to modify.

points.description: create_spline_actor: initial points, each with a 'location' (x, y, z).

properties.description: spawn_light: light component overrides (intensity, color, castShadows, useAsAtmosphereSunLight, attenuationRadius, innerConeAngle, outerConeAngle, sourceWidth, sourceHeight).

recapture.description: spawn_sky_light/create_sky_light/ensure_single_sky_light: recapture the scene into the sky light.

region.description: modify_heightmap/paint_landscape_layer: sub-region to affect (minX, minY, maxX, maxY); defaults to top-level minX/minY/maxX/maxY.

removeAll.description: remove_foliage: remove all foliage instances of every type.

rotationRange.description: scatter_meshes_along_spline/configure_mesh_randomization: max random yaw offset in degrees.

save.description: create_spline_mesh_component: save the Blueprint after the operation.

skipFlush.description: modify_heightmap/sculpt_landscape/paint_landscape_layer: skip the GPU flush for batched edits.

splineType.description: create_spline_actor: default point type. set_spline_type: type to apply (all points, or just pointIndex if given).

toolMode.description: sculpt_landscape: sculpt tool (default: Raise). Alias of 'tool'.

useRandomOffset.description: scatter_meshes_along_spline/configure_mesh_spacing: randomize mesh spacing along the spline.

name: build_environment

description: Spawn actors, set transforms, enable physics, add components, manage tags, and attach actors.

actorNames.description: Actor names for bulk actor operations.

arguments.description: Arguments to pass to an actor function.

childActor.description: Name of the child actor (for attach/detach operations).

filter.description: Optional actor label/name filter for list.

limit.description: Maximum number of actors to return.

name.description: find_by_name query; alias of actorName for spawn actions.

parentActor.description: Name of the parent actor (for attach operations).

name: control_actor

description: Start/stop PIE, control viewport camera, run console commands, take screenshots, simulate input.

action.description: Editor action. screenshot/take_screenshot captures the active viewport synchronously; the PNG is written to the returned absolute 'path' before the call returns, so it can be read back immediately to evaluate the result.

device.description: simulate_nav input device: 'gamepad' (default, sends DPad/face-button keys) or 'keyboard' (arrows/Enter/Esc/Tab).

direction.description: simulate_nav direction: Up/Down/Left/Right/Accept/Back/Next/Previous (PIE-only; faithfully routes a nav key through CommonUI, then returns the post-nav focus snapshot).

filename.description: screenshot: output PNG name (saved under Saved/Screenshots; defaults to a timestamp).

inputType.description: Alias for type used by simulate_input.

maxWidth.description: screenshot: downscale the capture to at most this width in px (0/omit = native viewport size).

route.description: simulate_input analog: 'pie' (default — straight to the PIE player controller, focus-immune) or 'slate' (through FSlateApplication + input preprocessors, exercising the CommonUI layer).

stabilizeFocus.description: simulate_nav: default true — before the nav, focus the PIE game viewport if focus isn't already inside it, so the faithful drive routes through CommonUI deterministically (never steals focus from an already-focused in-game widget). Set false to drive from whatever currently has focus.

type.description: Input event type for simulate_input: key_down, key_up, mouse_click, mouse_move, analog. analog injects a 1D axis value (key=Gamepad_LeftY/Gamepad_RightX/MouseX/... + value); the value persists in PlayerInput until the next sample, so hold = inject once, release = inject 0.

value.description: simulate_input analog: axis value (typically -1..1; mouse axes take pixel-ish deltas).

name: control_editor

description: Inspect any UObject: read/write properties, list components, export snapshots, and query class info. Actions: inspect_cdo (Blueprint CDO properties + all components without spawning an actor; use blueprintPath, optional detailed/componentName/propertyNames), inspect_class (class metadata), inspect_object (world actor), get_property/set_property (set_property saves the owning asset package by default; 'saved' reports the on-disk result), get_components, list_objects, find_by_class, find_by_tag, runtime_report, ui_focus (CommonUI PIE runtime snapshot: focused widget + path, the activatable owning focus + its desired-focus target, active activatable stack, current input type, and the active root's bound actions), find_objects (loaded-object discovery: className + optional pathContains substring + propertyNames readback — use for widget-tree template subobjects, slot objects, and live PIE widget state), diff_asset (structural diff of two on-disk .uasset versions: oldFilePath vs newFilePath — parent/interfaces/components/variables/graphs + CDO defaults + gasSignals).

assetName.description: diff_asset: object name inside the package (default = newFilePath filename stem).

componentNames.description: Component names to include detailed property readback for.

exactClass.description: find_objects: require the exact class (default false = IsA semantics).

includeCdo.description: find_objects: include class default objects (default false).

includeDefaults.description: diff_asset: also diff CDO default properties (default true).

markDirty.description: set_property: mark the owning package dirty (default true).

newFilePath.description: diff_asset: filesystem path to the NEW .uasset version (e.g. the working-tree file).

oldFilePath.description: diff_asset: filesystem path to the OLD .uasset version (e.g. a git revision extracted to a temp file).

pathContains.description: find_objects: case-insensitive substring filter on the object's full path.

save.description: set_property: persist the owning asset package to disk after the write (default true; defaults to false when markDirty is false). Level packages are never auto-saved — use control_editor save_all.

name: inspect

description: Create AI Controllers, configure Behavior Trees, Blackboards, EQS queries, perception systems, Behavior Tree graphs, and navigation.

activityTags.description: configure_slot_behavior: gameplay tags describing slot activity.

agentStepHeight.description: Maximum step height agent can climb (default: 35).

areaCost.description: Pathfinding cost multiplier for area (1.0 = normal).

baseObjectClass.description: add_blackboard_key: base class for Object/Class key types (default 'Actor').

bCreateBoxObstacle.description: Add box obstacle during nav generation.

behaviorType.description: configure_slot_behavior: behavior definition type for the slot.

blackboardPath.description: Path to blackboard asset. On 'create'/'create_behavior_tree' it is assigned to the new Behavior Tree (omit = unassigned).

broadcastInterval.description: Interval for state change broadcast (0 = single).

decoratorType.description: Decorator node type for add_decorator (expands to BTDecorator_<type>; 'Custom' uses nodeClass).

disabledAreaClass.description: Area class when smart link is disabled.

enabledAreaClass.description: Area class when smart link is enabled.

endPoint.description: End point of navigation link (relative to actor).

failsafeExtent.description: Failsafe extent for nav modifier when actor has no collision.

location.description: World location for nav link proxy.

nodeClass.description: Behavior Tree node class: engine name (e.g. 'BTDecorator_Blackboard'), a short name that expands to one, or a Blueprint class path.

parentConfigPath.description: configure_mass_entity: optional parent config to inherit from.

parentNodeId.description: Parent node id: 'root' or a node GUID. add_node/add_composite_node/add_task_node connect the new node under it; add_subnode/add_decorator/add_service attach to it.

properties.description: Properties to set on a graph node.

save.description: Save the asset(s) after the operation.

serviceType.description: Service node type for add_service (expands to BTService_<type>; 'Custom' uses nodeClass).

startPoint.description: Start point of navigation link (relative to actor).

targetActor.description: set_focus: alias for focusActorName (checked as fallback).

taskType.description: Task node type for add_task_node (expands to BTTask_<type>; 'Custom' uses nodeClass).

teamId.description: Team ID for perception affiliation (0=Neutral, 1=Player, 2=Enemy, etc.).

name: manage_ai

description: Create, import, duplicate, rename, delete assets. Edit Material graphs and instances. Analyze dependencies.

additionalOutputs.description: add_custom_expression/update_custom_expression: extra named outputs beyond the primary return, e.g. [{"name":"Mask","type":"Float1"}].

algorithm.description: create_normal_from_height: Sobel (default) or finite-difference gradient method.

alphaTexture.description: channel_pack: source texture for the output alpha channel.

amount.description: desaturate: blend amount 0-1 (default 1). sharpen: unsharp-mask amount 0-5 (default 1).

angle.description: create_gradient_texture: Linear gradient direction in degrees (default 0).

blueTexture.description: channel_pack: source texture for the output blue channel.

constA.description: set_node_value: ConstA default of an arithmetic node (Add/Multiply/…) when input A is unconnected.

constB.description: set_node_value: ConstB default of an arithmetic node when input B is unconnected.

dataTablePath.description: DataTable row CRUD: alias for assetPath (the DataTable).

depth.description: list: recursion depth filter relative to the queried path. get_node_connections: BFS hop limit (default 1; -1 unlimited).

downstream.description: get_node_connections: walk forward to all consumers (overrides direction/depth).

enableNanite.description: nanite_rebuild_mesh: enable Nanite virtualized geometry (default true).

endNodeId.description: get_node_chain: node ID (or "Main") to trace the signal path to.

endPin.description: get_node_chain: named material main-pin to trace to, e.g. 'BaseColor' (alternative to endNodeId).

exposeToLibrary.description: create_material_function: show in the Material Function Library picker (default true).

fallbackPercent.description: nanite_rebuild_mesh: Nanite fallback relative error percent 0-100 (default 0).

flipY.description: create_normal_from_height: flip the green channel (DirectX vs OpenGL normal convention).

format.description: import_data_table: 'csv' or 'json' (inferred from sourceText if omitted).

functionPath.description: use_material_function: material function asset path to call.

greenTexture.description: channel_pack: source texture for the output green channel.

includeTransient.description: get_asset_properties: also dump transient (non-serialized) properties (default false).

inPlace.description: invert/desaturate/adjust_curves: modify the source texture instead of writing a new one (default true).

input.description: adjust_curves: master curve input control points 0-1 (paired with output).

inputB.description: adjust_curves: blue-channel curve input control points.

inputG.description: adjust_curves: green-channel curve input control points.

inputR.description: adjust_curves: red-channel curve input control points.

inputs.description: add_custom_expression/update_custom_expression: named HLSL input pins, e.g. [{"name":"UV"}]. Each name becomes a connect_nodes inputName.

invertAlpha.description: invert: also invert the alpha channel (default false).

lacunarity.description: create_noise_texture: FBM frequency growth per octave (default 2).

landscapePath.description: generate_lods: landscape asset path (alternative to assetPath/assetPaths).

neverStream.description: set_streaming_priority: disable mip streaming for this texture (default false).

newName.description: rename/duplicate/move: new asset name, resolved into the source asset's folder (alternative to destinationPath).

nodeIds.description: delete_node: batch-delete multiple node IDs (alternative to nodeId).

noWeightBlend.description: add_landscape_layer: disable weight-blending for this layer (default false).

orphansOnly.description: get_connected_subgraph: return all nodes not connected to any output, ignoring nodeId.

output.description: adjust_curves: master curve output control points 0-1 (paired with input).

outputB.description: adjust_curves: blue-channel curve output control points.

outputG.description: adjust_curves: green-channel curve output control points.

outputPath.description: create_thumbnail/generate_report: file path (relative to project dir) to write output to. channel_extract: destination texture path.

outputR.description: adjust_curves: red-channel curve output control points.

overwrite.description: Overwrite if the asset/file already exists.

pattern.description: bulk_delete: substring filter applied to matching asset names when deleting by folderPath.

persistence.description: create_noise_texture: FBM amplitude falloff per octave (default 0.5).

physicalMaterialPath.description: add_landscape_layer: optional physical material asset path.

preserveArea.description: nanite_rebuild_mesh: preserve surface area during Nanite fallback mesh reduction (default true).

propertyName.description: set_asset_property: name of the reflected UPROPERTY to write.

r.description: set_node_value: red/X channel of a Constant2/3/4Vector or VectorParameter default.

radius.description: create_gradient_texture: Radial falloff radius (default 0.5). blur: box-blur pixel radius 1-10 (default 2).

redTexture.description: channel_pack: source texture for the output red channel.

reductionSettings.description: generate_lods: FMeshReductionSettings overrides applied to every generated LOD — percentTriangles/percentVertices (0-1, replace the progressive 50%/25%/... defaults), maxDeviation, pixelError, weldingThreshold, hardAngleThreshold, baseLODModel, recalculateNormals.

renderTargetPath.description: create_render_target: full asset path (alternative to name+path).

rowData.description: DataTable add/edit row: JSON object of row-struct fields (partial edit merges).

rowName.description: DataTable row CRUD: the row's key (FName).

rowStruct.description: create_data_table (required): row struct deriving from FTableRowBase — full path ('/Script/Module.Struct' or '/Game/.../UserStruct') or bare struct name.

save.description: Save the asset(s) after the operation.

searchAssets.description: find_by_tag: match asset registry/metadata tags (default true).

sourcePath.description: Source path for import/duplicate/rename/move (assetPath also accepted).

sourcePin.description: connect_nodes: named output pin on the source node (e.g. an MF call output); defaults to output 0.

sourceText.description: import_data_table: the CSV or JSON text to import (replaces all rows).

startNodeId.description: get_node_chain: node ID to trace the signal path from.

tablePath.description: DataTable row CRUD: alias for assetPath (the DataTable).

tag.description: find_by_tag: tag key to match (set_tags metadata or asset-registry tag).

trianglePercent.description: nanite_rebuild_mesh: Nanite fallback mesh triangle percent 0-100 (default 100).

upstream.description: get_node_connections: walk backward to all sources (overrides direction/depth).

waitForShaders.description: compile_material: block on the async shader workers so backend (not just translation) errors are reported. Slower; off by default.

name: manage_asset

description: Play/stop sounds, add audio components, configure mixes, attenuation, spatial audio, and author Sound Cues/MetaSounds.

applyEQ.description: configure_mix_eq: enable the mix's EQ effect.

applyToChildren.description: set_sound_mix_class_override/add_mix_modifier: apply the override to child sound classes.

attachTo.description: create_audio_component: actor to attach the component to (alias of actorName).

childIndex.description: Input pin index on the source node for connect_cue_nodes.

effectPresetPath.description: add_source_effect: existing effect preset asset path.

highFrequency.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-3 frequency.

highGain.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-3 gain.

highMidFrequency.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-2 frequency.

highMidGain.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-2 gain.

loopCount.description: add_cue_node (looping node): fixed loop count when not indefinite.

lowFrequency.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-0 frequency.

lowGain.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-0 gain.

midFrequency.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-1 frequency.

midGain.description: configure_mix_eq: flat alias for eqSettings band-1 gain.

occlusionLowPassFilterFrequency.description: configure_occlusion: low-pass filter frequency in Hz.

packagePath.description: Directory path for asset creation (alias of path).

replace.description: set_dialogue_context: replace an existing mapping for the same speaker.

save.description: Save the asset(s) after the operation. Default true.

savePath.description: Directory path for asset creation (alias of path).

soundWavePath.description: set_dialogue_context: SoundWave asset path for the context mapping.

sourceNodeId.description: ID of the consuming (parent) node; pass 'Root' in connect_cue_nodes to wire the cue output.

spatialize.description: Enable spatialization on the attenuation asset (alias of enabled).

targetNodeId.description: ID of the target (feeding child) node.

name: manage_audio

description: Create Blueprints, add SCS components (mesh, collision, camera), and manipulate graph nodes.

assetPath.description: Blueprint asset path for graph actions (create_node/connect_pins/etc.); alias of blueprintPath.

autoConnect.description: add_node: auto-wire the new node's exec-in to an open event chain (default false).

blueprintCandidates.description: Ordered list of candidate blueprint paths to try when blueprintPath/name is absent.

blueprintType.description: Path or name of the parent class.

clipping.description: set_clipping: Inherit, ClipToBounds, ClipToBoundsWithoutIntersecting, ClipToBoundsAlways, or OnDemand.

colorAndOpacity.description: Widget tint color, 0-1 components (add_text_block, add_image, add_button).

compile.description: Compile the blueprint(s) after the operation.

createIfMissing.description: ensure_exists: create the blueprint if it doesn't exist (default true).

dataTable.description: set_common_button_input_action: DataTable asset path (CommonInputActionDataBase row struct).

delegateName.description: Multicast delegate name (bind_on_clicked/bind_on_hovered default OnClicked/OnHovered; bind_on_value_changed default OnValueChanged; bind_event_to_delegate).

fill.description: set_size: stretch a HBox/VBox child to fill (vs Automatic).

fillWeight.description: set_size: fill weight when fill is true.

fromState.description: get_transition_rule_graph: source state name (paired with toState).

handlerEventName.description: bind_event_to_delegate: name for the generated handler custom event (default On_<delegateName>).

handlerFunction.description: bind_event_to_delegate: optional function the handler calls.

handlerTargetWidget.description: bind_event_to_delegate: optional widget the handler acts on.

includePinLinks.description: get_graph_details: include per-node pins with defaults and "<nodeGuid>:<pinName>" link refs (always on inside get_transition_rule_graph's ruleGraph).

message.description: show_widget: notification text when widgetId is "notification".

multiLine.description: add_text_input: use a multi-line editable text box.

newWidgetClass.description: replace_widget_class: class to swap the named widget to.

nodeName.description: add_node: name for a CustomEvent node (nodeType=CustomEvent).

override.description: add_function: implement an inherited BlueprintImplementableEvent/BlueprintNativeEvent instead of creating a new function.

ownerPin.description: bind_event_to_delegate: output pin on the source event exposing the delegate's owner object.

pad.description: set_padding: uniform padding on all sides.

panelType.description: wrap_root: new root panel class (Overlay, VerticalBox, HorizontalBox, CanvasPanel).

parentClass.description: Path or name of the parent class.

parentName.description: Name of an existing panel widget to attach into (add_widget_component, add_health_bar/add_crosshair/add_minimap/etc.).

parentSlot.description: Name of the parent panel widget to add the new widget under.

path.description: Destination folder for a created asset (create_widget_blueprint, create_common_button_style/create_common_text_style, create_*_menu, etc.); falls back to savePath, then folder.

position.description: set_position: Canvas slot position (alternative to posX/posY).

preset.description: set_anchor: named anchor preset (TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, CenterLeft, Center, CenterRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight, StretchHorizontal, StretchVertical, StretchAll).

property.description: set_widget_binding: property name to bind (NOT_IMPLEMENTED — validated only).

propertyNames.description: get_widget_info + widgetName: only these properties (explicit null when missing); omit for all exportable properties.

requestedPath.description: Explicit blueprint path override, checked before name/blueprintPath/blueprintCandidates (most blueprint_* actions).

save.description: Save the asset(s) after the operation.

size.description: Either a number (add_crosshair/add_minimap/add_ammo_counter: icon size) or an {x,y} object (set_size: canvas slot pixel size).

slotName.description: Name for the widget being added / the slot to target.

stateMachine.description: get_transition_rule_graph: state machine graph name to search; all state machines searched when omitted.

stretch.description: add_scale_box: stretch mode (None, Fill, ScaleToFit, ScaleToFitX, ScaleToFitY, ScaleToFill, UserSpecified).

stringKey.description: bind_localized_text: key within the string table.

style.description: set_style: legacy value alias for propertyName="Style" when propertyName is omitted.

targetFunction.description: bind_on_clicked/bind_on_hovered: self UFUNCTION to call (alias functionName).

targetText.description: bind_on_value_changed: text widget to live-update with the new value.

targetWidget.description: set_widget_binding: name of the widget to bind (NOT_IMPLEMENTED — validated only).

text.description: Initial text (add_common_text, add_text_block, add_rich_text_block, add_interaction_prompt, add_widget_component).

texturePath.description: add_image: texture asset path for the brush.

toState.description: get_transition_rule_graph: target state name (paired with fromState).

transitionIndex.description: get_transition_rule_graph: 0-based pick when parallel transitions between the same states match (see matchCount in the response).

transitionName.description: get_transition_rule_graph: transition node title or rule-graph name, as an alternative to fromState/toState.

userSpecifiedScale.description: add_scale_box: scale used when stretch is UserSpecified.

variableType.description: Variable type (e.g., Boolean, Float, Integer, Vector, String, Object)

visibility.description: set_visibility: Visible, Hidden, Collapsed, HitTestInvisible, or SelfHitTestInvisible.

waitForCompletion.description: create/create_blueprint: wait for a coalesced concurrent creation to finish before responding.

widgetId.description: show_widget: special id ("notification") or target identifier.

widgetName.description: Target widget's name within the tree (remove/rename/reparent; DesiredFocusWidget; get_widget_info: return this widget's property values + objectPath).

name: manage_blueprint

description: Create Character Blueprints with movement setup and animation assets. Advanced gameplay actions scaffold convention-named variables and defaults; they do not implement runtime logic.

canCrouch.description: configure_crouch: whether the character can crouch (default true).

customSpeed.description: add_custom_movement_mode: speed stored as the {modeName}Speed variable default and MaxCustomMovementSpeed.

jumpHeight.description: Desired jump apex height in cm; converted to JumpZVelocity via sqrt(2*g*h) using effective gravity.

jumpHoldTime.description: Max hold time for variable jump.

name.description: Name of the asset to create.

runSpeed.description: Run speed; writes MaxWalkSpeed when walkSpeed is absent, otherwise stored as the RunSpeed variable default.

soundPath.description: Sound asset path (SoundBase) mapped to surfaceType by map_surface_to_sound.

sprintSpeed.description: Sprint speed; stored as the SprintSpeed variable default (no CharacterMovement property).

name: manage_character

description: Scaffold combat data on Blueprints: weapon/combat assets plus convention-named variables and CDO defaults (damage types, hitboxes, reload, melee combo/parry/block parameters). Most actions declare data for game code to consume; they do not implement runtime combat logic.

criticalMultiplier.description: Critical hit damage multiplier (consumed by configure_damage_execution, not set_weapon_stats).

damagePerSecond.description: Damage per second for damage effects.

headshotMultiplier.description: Headshot damage multiplier (consumed by configure_damage_execution, not set_weapon_stats).

hitboxBoneName.description: Bone name for the hitbox; stored as the HitboxBoneName variable by setup_hitbox_component.

maxAmmo.description: Total reserve ammo (consumed by setup_ammo_system, not setup_reload_system).

name.description: Name identifier: asset name for create actions; hitbox component name for setup_hitbox_component.

shieldAmount.description: Initial shield value; stored by create_shield as the CurrentShield variable default.

name: manage_combat

description: Niagara particle systems, VFX, debug shapes, and GPU simulations. Create systems, emitters, modules, and control particle effects.

angle.description: particle: cone shape angle in degrees.

attachToActor.description: Actor label to attach spawned Niagara actor to.

autoConnect.description: Automatically connect a compatible Niagara graph pin pair.

autoDestroy.description: particle/spawn_niagara: destroy the spawned actor once its effect finishes.

boxSize.description: particle: box shape dimensions [x, y, z].

direction.description: particle: cone shape direction (x, y, z).

emitterName.description: Emitter name in a Niagara system.

endLocation.description: debug_shape/particle: end point for line/cylinder/arrow shapes (x, y, z).

lightName.description: create_dynamic_light: actor label for the spawned light.

scale.description: particle/spawn_niagara: uniform scale (also accepts an array).

scriptType.description: Niagara script target, e.g. Spawn or Update.

sourcePinName.description: connect_niagara_pins: name of the source (output) pin.

targetPinName.description: connect_niagara_pins: name of the target (input) pin.

name: manage_effect

description: Create Gameplay Abilities, Effects, Attribute Sets, and Gameplay Cues for ability systems.

abilityPath.description: Path to ability asset. add_ability: the ability class to add to the set; elsewhere an alias for blueprintPath.

activationBlockedTags.description: Tags that block activation of this ability.

activationRequiredTags.description: Tags required to activate this ability.

actorName.description: get_attribute: live PIE actor to read (object name or label; defaults to the player pawn).

applicationRequiredTags.description: Tags required to apply this effect.

attribute.description: get_attribute: attribute to read at runtime (e.g. 'Health'). add_effect_modifier: REQUIRED target attribute for the modifier - 'AttributeName' or 'SetClassName.AttributeName' (must be unambiguous across loaded AttributeSets).

attributeSetPath.description: Path to Attribute Set asset (alias for blueprintPath).

blockAbilitiesWithTag.description: Tags of abilities blocked while this is active.

blueprintPath.description: Blueprint asset path. attributeSetPath/effectPath/abilityPath/cuePath are accepted aliases.

cancelAbilitiesWithTag.description: Tags of abilities to cancel when this activates.

cuePath.description: Path to Gameplay Cue asset (alias for blueprintPath).

effectPath.description: Path to effect asset (alias for blueprintPath).

grantedTags.description: Tags granted while effect is active.

modifierIndex.description: set_modifier_magnitude: index into the effect's Modifiers array (0-based).

name.description: Name of the asset to create.

period.description: set_effect_duration: execution period in seconds (> 0) for periodic effects; requires durationType HasDuration or Infinite.

requiresLineOfSight.description: set_ability_targeting: whether targeting requires line of sight (default false).

setByCallerTag.description: add_effect_modifier/set_modifier_magnitude: registered gameplay tag for a SetByCaller modifier magnitude; mutually exclusive with a numeric magnitude.

setName.description: create_ability_set: display name stored on the set.

setPath.description: create_ability_set/add_ability: path of the ability-set data asset. Note: create_ability_set scaffolds a PrimaryDataAsset blueprint with GrantedAbilities/GrantedEffects/GrantedTags variables; it is not an engine ability-set type.

tag.description: add_tag_to_asset: gameplay tag to add (must be registered in the project's gameplay tag registry).

targetingAngle.description: set_ability_targeting: cone angle in degrees for cone-based targeting (default 360).

taskClassName.description: add_ability_task: optional soft class name recorded for the task (informational).

taskType.description: Type of ability task to add.

name: manage_gas

description: Create procedural meshes using Geometry Script: booleans, deformers, UVs, collision, and LOD generation.

actorName.description: Name of the actor to operate on (also sets the label for create_* actions).

alignToSpline.description: duplicate_along_spline: orient copies to the spline tangent.

amount.description: Generic amount for operations (bevel size, inset distance, etc.).

capped.description: revolve: cap the ends of the revolved profile.

compact.description: merge_vertices: compact the mesh buffers after merging.

curveAngle.description: Total sweep angle in degrees for create_spiral_stairs (mutually exclusive with numTurns; default 90).

edgeGroupA.description: bridge: first polygroup edge to bridge from.

edgeGroupB.description: bridge: second polygroup edge to bridge to.

edgeIndex.description: edge_split: single edge index to split (alternative to edges).

extent.description: bend/twist: warp extent along the axis.

featureAngleThreshold.description: quadrangulate: angle in degrees above which an edge is treated as a feature.

fillHoles.description: self_union/remesh_voxel: fill holes left by the operation.

floating.description: create_stairs/create_spiral_stairs: omit the support structure beneath the steps.

hardEdgeAngle.description: Opening angle in degrees above which recalculate_normals splits hard edges.

hullCount.description: Max convex hulls for generate_collision (convex/convex_decomposition only).

hullPrecision.description: generate_complex_collision: convex decomposition search factor in [0,1] (default 0.5; higher searches harder).

iterations.description: Number of iterations for smooth, remesh.

keepInside.description: boolean_trim: keep the portion inside the trim surface.

keepTool.description: Keep the tool actor after a boolean operation (default true).

latticeResolution.description: Control lattice resolution for lattice deformation.

lodCount.description: Number of LOD levels to generate.

majorSegments.description: create_torus: major ring segment count (alias of numRings).

maxHullCount.description: generate_complex_collision: max convex hulls to generate.

minorSegments.description: create_torus: minor tube segment count (alias of radialSegments).

name.description: Alias of actorName for create_* actions.

numCuts.description: loop_cut: number of cuts to insert.

numRings.description: Ring count: sphere latitude rings (switches to lat-long topology) or torus major segments.

numSides.description: Radial side count for cylinder and cone (alias of segments).

numTurns.description: Number of full revolutions for create_spiral_stairs (mutually exclusive with curveAngle).

profile.description: revolve: 2D profile points to revolve, each {x, y}.

profileActors.description: loft: actor names providing the cross-section profiles.

projectionType.description: project_uv: projection mode (e.g. box, planar, cylindrical).

radialSegments.description: Radial segments: sphere longitude steps (switches to lat-long topology) or torus minor segments.

recomputeNormals.description: set_lod_settings: recompute normals for this LOD.

recomputeTangents.description: set_lod_settings: recompute tangents for this LOD.

reductionPercent.description: Percent of triangles to remove for simplify_mesh (mutually exclusive with targetTriangleCount/targetPercentage).

scaleEnd.description: sweep/extrude_along_spline: cross-section scale at the path end.

scaleStart.description: sweep/extrude_along_spline: cross-section scale at the path start.

screenSizes.description: Array of screen sizes for each LOD.

segments.description: Number of segments for bevel, subdivide.

splitFactor.description: edge_split: split position along the edge in [0,1].

steps.description: revolve/sweep/chamfer: step count (distinct from numSteps, which is stairs-specific).

subdivisions.description: create_sphere: icosphere subdivision count (default topology; alternative to numRings/radialSegments).

targetActor.description: Actor receiving the result of a boolean operation.

targetEdgeLength.description: Target edge length for remesh_uniform (mutually exclusive with targetTriangleCount).

targetPercentage.description: Percent of triangles to keep for simplify_mesh when targetTriangleCount is absent (default 50).

targetTriangleCount.description: Target triangle count for simplify_mesh and remesh_uniform.

tolerance.description: weld_vertices/merge_vertices: distance threshold for merging coincident vertices.

toolActor.description: Actor used as the cutting/combining tool in a boolean operation.

topRadius.description: create_cone: radius at the top (0 for a point).

trianglePercent.description: set_lod_settings: percent of triangles to keep at this LOD.

trimActorName.description: boolean_trim: actor used as the trimming surface.

twist.description: sweep/extrude_along_spline: twist in degrees along the path.

weld.description: mirror: weld vertices along the mirror plane.

weldDistance.description: Distance threshold for weld_vertices (alias of tolerance).

weldTolerance.description: edge_split: distance tolerance for post-split welding.

weldVertices.description: edge_split: weld coincident vertices after splitting.

name: manage_geometry

description: Create interactive objects: doors, switches, chests, levers. Set up destructible meshes and trigger volumes.

folder.description: Destination folder for create_* actions ('path'/'savePath' accepted as aliases; default /Game/Interactables).

openAngle.description: Door open rotation angle in degrees.

openTime.description: Time to open/close door in seconds.

requiresKey.description: Whether interaction requires a key item.

resetTime.description: Time to reset switch in seconds.

name: manage_interaction

description: Create item data assets, world pickups, loot tables, and crafting recipes. Component/system actions scaffold convention-named variables and defaults for game code to consume; they do not implement runtime inventory logic.

abilityGrants.description: Enable ability grant support when equipped.

actorPath.description: Path to actor Blueprint for loot drop.

attachToSocket.description: Attach mesh to socket when equipped.

defaultSocket.description: Default socket for equipped item attachment.

dropOnDeath.description: Drop loot when the actor dies.

encumbranceThreshold.description: Encumbrance threshold ratio (misspelled 'encumberance*' params still accepted).

ingredientItemPath.description: Item path to add as a recipe ingredient.

name.description: Name of the asset to create.

outputItemPath.description: Path to item produced by recipe.

passiveEffects.description: Enable passive effect support when equipped.

properties.description: Properties to apply to an item data asset (create_item_data_asset, set_item_properties). Keys matching native properties are written via reflection; other string/number/bool values are stored in the asset's string property bag (reported as storedInPropertyBag).

save.description: Save the asset(s) after the operation.

statModifiers.description: Enable stat modifier support when equipped.

uniqueItems.description: Whether each stack entry is unique.

name: manage_inventory

description: Load/save levels, configure streaming, and build lighting.

assetPath.description: Asset path for metadata or validation aliases.

color.description: RGBA color as an array [r, g, b, a].

lightType.description: Light type. Accepts short names (Point), class names (PointLight), or lowercase (point).

name.description: Name alias used by light and utility actions.

newName.description: New asset name for rename operations.

overwrite.description: Allow replacing an existing destination level.

saveDirtyPackages.description: load/load_level: save dirty world/content packages before loading (required in headless/unattended mode).

subLevelPath.description: Level asset path alias for add_sublevel.

name: manage_level

description: Create levels and sublevels. Configure World Partition, streaming, data layers, HLOD, and level instances.

bBlockOnSlowStreaming.description: configure_grid_size: block on slow streaming for this grid.

bIsPrivate.description: create_data_layer: mark the data layer private.

bounds.description: Volume bounds as [minX, minY, minZ, maxX, maxY, maxZ]; set_volume_bounds alternative to volumeLocation + volumeExtent.

bPackStaticMeshes.description: Include static meshes in packed level.

bShouldBeVisible.description: Level should be visible when loaded.

bShouldBlockOnLoad.description: Block game until level is loaded.

bUnbound.description: create_post_process_volume/add_post_process_volume: affect the whole level regardless of extent.

bUseExternalActors.description: Enable One File Per Actor (OFPA/External Actors) for Data Layer compatibility. Automatically enabled when bCreateWorldPartition is true.

createIfMissing.description: configure_grid_size: create the named grid if it doesn't exist (default: true).

createVolume.description: Create a streaming volume (true) or just report existing volumes (false). Default: true.

filter.description: get_volumes_info: filter volumes by actor label substring.

gridName.description: configure_grid_size: name of the World Partition runtime grid (default grid if omitted).

killZHeight.description: add_kill_z_volume: Z height for the kill volume.

layerType.description: configure_hlod_layer: HLOD generation method (default: MeshMerge). Legacy aliases SimplifiedMesh/ApproximatedMesh are also accepted.

levelAssetPath.description: Path to the level asset for instancing.

loadAfterCreate.description: create_level: open the new level in the editor after creation.

packedLevelName.description: Name for the packed level actor.

postProcessSettings.description: create_post_process_volume: post-process override key/values (bloomEnabled, exposureBias, vignetteIntensity, saturation, contrast, gamma).

priority.description: configure_grid_size: grid priority. Also create_physics_volume/set_volume_properties (physics volume priority) and create_post_process_volume/add_post_process_volume (blend priority).

save.description: Save the asset(s) after the operation.

volumeType.description: get_volumes_info: filter volumes by class name substring.

name: manage_level_structure

description: Multiplayer and input setup: property replication (conditions, RepNotify, push model, dormancy, relevancy), RPCs (Server/Client/Multicast), authority/ownership, network prediction, net driver settings; Enhanced Input authoring (InputActions, mapping contexts, triggers, modifiers); game framework classes (GameMode/GameState/PlayerController/PlayerState/GameInstance/HUD, match and scoring rules); split-screen/local players, LAN host/join, and voice chat.

attenuationRadius.description: set_voice_attenuation: distance at which voice starts attenuating (default 2000).

bAllowJoinInProgress.description: configure_local_session_settings: allow players to join after start.

bDelayedStart.description: configure_game_rules: sets AGameMode::bDelayedStart when the property exists on the class.

bIsLANMatch.description: configure_local_session_settings: mark the session as a LAN match.

controllerId.description: add_local_player: controller id for the new local player.

defaultPawnClass.description: create_game_mode: default pawn class path. Alias: pawnClass (set_default_pawn_class).

enabled.description: configure_split_screen / configure_lan_play: enable flag for the feature being configured.

executeTravel.description: host_lan_server: actually perform ServerTravel instead of just building the URL (default false).

forceRespawn.description: set_respawn_rules: whether respawn is forced rather than optional.

gameModeBlueprint.description: Alias of blueprintPath for GameFramework actions (set_default_pawn_class, set_player_controller_class, set_game_state_class, set_player_state_class, configure_game_rules, setup_match_states, configure_round_system, configure_team_system, configure_scoring_system, configure_spawn_system, set_respawn_rules, configure_spectating, get_game_framework_info).

interfaceType.description: configure_session_interface: online subsystem interface to use.

key.description: Key id for a mapping (e.g. SpaceBar, Gamepad_FaceButton_Bottom).

localPlayerNum.description: mute_player: local player index applying the mute.

mapName.description: host_lan_server: map to travel to when hosting.

maxRespawns.description: configure_spawn_system: maximum respawns per player (-1 = unlimited).

minNetUpdateFrequency.description: Minimum update frequency when idle (Hz, default 2).

modifierType.description: Input modifier class (set_input_modifier, e.g. Negate, SwizzleAxis).

muted.description: mute_player: mute (true) or unmute (false), default true.

netLoadOnClient.description: Net load on client for replication graph.

numRounds.description: configure_round_system: total rounds in the match.

ownerActorName.description: Name of owner actor (null to clear).

parentClass.description: create_game_mode / create_game_state / create_player_controller / create_player_state / create_game_instance / create_hud_class: parent class path (defaults to the native base class).

path.description: Destination folder for a created input asset.

playerIndex.description: remove_local_player: local player index to remove (cannot be 0).

playerName.description: mute_player: player name to mute/unmute (or use targetPlayerId).

playerStartName.description: configure_player_start: specific PlayerStart actor to configure (falls back to actorName).

playerStartTag.description: configure_player_start: PlayerStartTag to assign (default derived from teamIndex).

pushToTalkKey.description: configure_push_to_talk: key bound to push-to-talk (default V).

replace.description: set_input_trigger: clear existing triggers before adding (default false = idempotent dedupe).

respawnDelay.description: configure_spawn_system / set_respawn_rules: seconds before a player respawns (default 5).

respawnLocation.description: set_respawn_rules: named respawn location strategy (default PlayerStart).

save.description: Game framework actions: persist the created/modified asset (or level, for configure_player_start) after applying changes (default false).

scorePerObjective.description: configure_scoring_system: points awarded per objective completion.

serverAddress.description: join_lan_server: address of the LAN server to connect to.

serverName.description: host_lan_server: display name for the hosted server.

spawnSelectionMethod.description: configure_spawn_system: how spawn points are chosen (default Random).

states.description: setup_match_states: match state names to record on the Blueprint.

structName.description: Name of struct for custom serialization.

systemWide.description: mute_player: apply the mute system-wide rather than just locally.

targetPlayerId.description: mute_player: player id to mute/unmute (or use playerName).

teamIndex.description: configure_player_start: team index used to build the default PlayerStartTag.

travelOptions.description: host_lan_server / join_lan_server: extra URL options appended to the travel string.

variableName.description: add_network_prediction_data: name for the created replicated variable (default PredictionData_<dataType>).

voiceEnabled.description: enable_voice_chat: enable or disable voice chat.

voiceSettings.description: configure_voice_settings: nested settings object ({volume, noiseGateThreshold, noiseSuppression, echoCancellation, sampleRate}).

winScore.description: configure_scoring_system: score required to win the match.

name: manage_networking

description: Edit Level Sequences: add tracks, bind actors, set keyframes, control playback, and record camera.

bindingId.description: add_keyframe: sequence binding GUID (alternative to actorName).

name: manage_sequence

description: Dynamic MCP tool management, scoped to YOUR session: enable/disable tools and categories at runtime without affecting other connected sessions (reset or reconnect restores server defaults). Actions: list_tools, list_categories, enable_tools, disable_tools, enable_category, disable_category, get_status, reset.

action.description: list_tools: show all tools with status. list_categories: show categories. enable/disable_tools: toggle specific tools. enable/disable_category: toggle category. get_status: current state. reset: restore defaults.

category.description: Category name to enable/disable (core, world, gameplay, utility, all)

name: manage_tools

description: Run profiling, set quality/CVars, execute console commands, execute Python scripts, run UBT, and manage widgets.

actors.description: merge_actors: actor names/labels/paths to merge (at least 2).

additionalArgs.description: run_ubt: extra UBT command-line arguments (alias: arguments).

allowModalApis.description: execute_python: opt out of the modal-API guard (reload_packages / *_with_dialog / EditorDialog are blocked by default — a modal dialog permanently freezes a headless editor). Only pass true when the exact call cannot prompt.

boostPlayerLocation.description: configure_texture_streaming: boost streaming around the active camera location.

buildId.description: get_build_status: buildId from run_ubt (default: most recent build this session). Returns status running|succeeded|failed, [N/M] progress, parsed errors, warningCount, resultLine, logPath.

categoryName.description: spawn_category: gameplay debugger category name (falls back to 'category' if absent).

className.description: generate_test_stub: C++ class symbol (default derived from testName, e.g. FCombatDamageAppliesTest).

contains.description: get_log/tail_log: case-insensitive substring the message must contain.

count.description: get_log/tail_log: max lines to return (default 100, max 2000).

detailed.description: generate_memory_report: emit the full/verbose report (memreport -full) instead of the summary.

duration.description: run_benchmark: seconds to run before completing (default 60).

filename.description: screenshot: output PNG filename (sanitized; default a timestamp).

filter.description: Substring filter over automation test display name / full path / test name (run_tests, list_tests).

flagsExpr.description: generate_test_stub: override the EAutomationTestFlags expression (default EditorContext | EngineFilter).

forceRecompile.description: optimize_shaders: recompile all shaders regardless of mode.

instancing.description: optimize_draw_calls: enable dynamic mesh draw command instancing.

maxTests.description: Max tests to queue for run_tests (1-500, default 50).

noUBA.description: run_ubt: pass -NoUBA (default true — UBA-built binaries break later Live Coding patches). Set false for faster UBA builds when no LC patching will follow.

outputPath.description: generate_test_stub: .cpp path to write (default: the bridge plugin's GeneratedTests dir).

overwrite.description: generate_test_stub: replace the file if it already exists (default false).

packageName.description: merge_actors: destination package path for the merged static mesh (alias: outputPath).

path.description: screenshot: output directory, relative to the project (must not escape it); default Saved/Screenshots/WindowsEditor.

replaceSourceActors.description: merge_actors: destroy the source actors once the merge succeeds (default false).

returnBase64.description: screenshot: include the base64-encoded PNG in the response (default true).

runId.description: Run identifier returned by run_tests; pass to get_test_results.

savePath.description: create_widget: destination folder for the new widget blueprint (default /Game/UI/Widgets).

sinceSeq.description: get_log/tail_log: return only lines with seq > this (incremental polling; response carries nextSeq + dropped).

spec.description: run_tests suite:"ui-nav": single spec to run, by name or filename (e.g. "pause_menu"); omit to run every spec in tests/ui-nav.

suite.description: run_tests: "ui-nav" runs the checked-in CommonUI focus/nav spec suite (tests/ui-nav) via the external pwsh runner, fire-and-poll like run_ubt; omit for engine automation tests. Needs pwsh on PATH and an idle editor.

target.description: run_ubt: build target (e.g. MyProjectEditor). Non-blocking: returns a buildId immediately; poll get_build_status.

test.description: Exact/partial test name to run (run_tests; alias for filter).

testName.description: generate_test_stub: the registered test path, e.g. 'Combat.DamageApplies' (also the run_tests filter).

verbosity.description: get_log/tail_log: minimum severity to include — Fatal|Error|Warning|Display|Log|Verbose|VeryVerbose (default Verbose = all).

widgetType.description: create_widget: informational widget-type tag echoed back in the response.

name: system_control
